title: Society
content:
There was a young person called Smarty,
     Who sent out his cards for a party;
        So exclusive and few
        Were the friends that he knew
     That no one was present but Smarty.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Society"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
